title: Send An AGV To A Selected Square Using The Go-to Function
summary: Use the Robot Selection Go-to function to send an AGV that is not in a task to a selected square. The training source shows a short sequence: select the AGV, select Go to, choose the destination square, and confirm.
when_to_use: Use when an AGV is not in a task and needs to be sent to a selected square using the Go-to function shown in the training source. The source also frames this as helpful for quick recovery or repositioning scenarios.
not_for: Do not use this procedure if the AGV is in a task, because the source only describes Go-to for an AGV not in a task.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Select the AGV in the interface, verify it is not in a task, choose the Go-to destination square, and confirm the move.

safety_notes: Use only for an AGV not in a task.
The source frames this function as useful for quick recovery; no lockout, production stop, or additional safety controls are stated in the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the robot or object selection interface
Ability to select an AGV object
Go to function in the interface
Destination square selection and Confirm control

access_required: Access to the robot or object selection interface
system_preconditions: The selected AGV is not in a task.

visual_references.description: Training slide and frame showing the Robot Selection Go-to function steps and AGV object selection context.

steps.title: Select the AGV object in the interface
steps.purpose: Identify the AGV to be moved and display its AGV information in the interface.
steps.instruction: Open the robot or object selection view and select the AGV object. Under AGV, select the AGV so the interface shows AGV information.
steps.expected_result: The AGV is selected and AGV information is displayed.
steps.healthy_condition: The selected AGV can be highlighted or otherwise identified in the interface, and AGV information appears after selection.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV cannot be selected or AGV information does not display after selection.

actions.label: Select AGV object
actions.exact_action: Select the object under AGV to show AGV information.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: AGV object selection area and the AGV information area referenced in the training segment.

stop_or_escalate_if: AGV information does not display after selection.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transcript states the user selects the object, and under AGV, selecting it will show AGV information.
Training slide/frame associated with AGV object selection and Go-to workflow.

steps.title: Verify the AGV is not in a task
steps.purpose: Confirm the Go-to function is being used only in the condition supported by the source.
steps.instruction: Before using Go to, verify the selected AGV is not in a task.
steps.expected_result: The AGV is confirmed to be not in a task and is eligible for the Go-to function described in the source.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGV is not in a task.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV is in a task.

actions.label: Verify AGV task state
actions.exact_action: Verify the AGV is not in a task before using the Go-to function.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Slide text stating that an AGV not in a task can be sent to any square.

stop_or_escalate_if: The AGV is in a task.
The interface does not provide enough information to determine whether the AGV is in a task.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Slide text: An AGV not in a task can be sent to any square. Steps shown: 1. Select an AGV 2. Select Go to 3. Select which square you want the AGV to go to 4. Select Confirm.

steps.title: Select the Go to function
steps.purpose: Open the movement control used to send the selected AGV to a chosen square.
steps.instruction: Select the Go to function or button for the selected AGV.
steps.expected_result: The Go-to control is activated and the interface is ready for destination selection.
steps.healthy_condition: The Go to control is available and can be selected.
steps.failure_condition: The Go to control is unavailable or cannot be selected.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Go to control shown in the Robot Selection training slide.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Go to action is not available.
The Go to action cannot be selected from the available interface.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Slide text: An AGV not in a task can be sent to any square. Steps shown: 1. Select an AGV 2. Select Go to 3. Select which square you want the AGV to go to 4. Select Confirm.

steps.title: Select the destination square
steps.purpose: Choose the square where the AGV should be sent.
steps.instruction: Select which square you want the AGV to go to.
steps.expected_result: A destination square is selected for the AGV.
steps.healthy_condition: The intended square is selected in the interface.
steps.failure_condition: A square cannot be selected or the intended destination cannot be identified.

actions.label: Choose square
actions.exact_action: Select which square you want the AGV to go to.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The step list on the training slide showing destination square selection.

stop_or_escalate_if: A destination square cannot be selected.
The intended square cannot be identified in the interface.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Slide text: An AGV not in a task can be sent to any square. Steps shown: 1. Select an AGV 2. Select Go to 3. Select which square you want the AGV to go to 4. Select Confirm.

steps.title: Confirm the Go-to action
steps.purpose: Submit the selected destination so the AGV is sent to the chosen square.
steps.instruction: Select Confirm to send the AGV to the chosen square.
steps.expected_result: The Go-to action is confirmed and the selected AGV is sent to the chosen square.
steps.healthy_condition: The interface accepts the confirmation and the AGV is sent to the selected square.
steps.failure_condition: The action cannot be confirmed or the AGV is not sent after confirmation.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The final Confirm step shown on the Robot Selection Go-to training slide.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Go-to action cannot be confirmed.
The AGV is not sent after confirmation.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Slide text: An AGV not in a task can be sent to any square. Steps shown: 1. Select an AGV 2. Select Go to 3. Select which square you want the AGV to go to 4. Select Confirm.

success_criteria: The selected AGV is sent to the chosen square using the Go-to function.
The Go-to sequence can be completed by selecting the AGV, selecting Go to, choosing a square, and confirming.
healthy_conditions: The AGV can be selected in the interface.
AGV information displays after AGV selection.
The AGV is not in a task before Go to is used.
The Go to control is available.
A destination square can be selected.
The confirmation is accepted and the AGV is sent to the chosen square.
failure_conditions: The AGV is in a task.
AGV information does not display after selection.
The Go to control is unavailable or cannot be selected.
A destination square cannot be selected.
The Go-to action cannot be confirmed.
The AGV is not sent after confirmation.
escalation_guidance: Do not proceed if the AGV is in a task; the source only supports this procedure for an AGV not in a task.
Escalate if the AGV cannot be selected, AGV information does not display after selection, or the Go-to action cannot be confirmed from the available interface.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Primary training slide showing the Robot Selection Go-to workflow and AGV object selection context.

missing_details: The source does not specify the exact screen name beyond robot or object selection context.
The source does not provide exact AGV status fields or values to use when verifying the AGV is not in a task.
The source does not provide a time estimate.
The source does not specify whether production stop or LOTO is required.
The source does not provide exact button labels beyond 'Go to' and 'Confirm' or any command-line/API equivalents.
